overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The player moves from under an elevated highway through a busy intersection with holographic billboards and neon signage, then along commercial sidewalks past the Ripley's Pharmacy storefront.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass alongside industrial buildings

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with steel support beams overhead
illuminated building sign with RCF lettering and red-green stripes
large concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway
concrete wall with spray-painted graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass in an industrial urban area. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a building with an illuminated RCF sign, passing graffiti-covered walls and large support pillars while sparse traffic moves on the street to the right.

crossing multi-lane street with futuristic vehicles passing through intersection

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying NCOLA advertisement on orange support structure
vertical billboard featuring REAL WATER advertisement with portrait
tall round skyscraper with vertical illuminated strips
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into a wide open intersection at dusk, with the sky visible in orange and purple hues. Large holographic billboards for NCOLA and Real Water dominate the view while the player crosses yellow-striped crosswalks, navigating through moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles.

passing other pedestrians walking in same direction along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past illuminated billboards and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered commercial sidewalk lined with bright illuminated advertising panels and holographic billboards. Walking on orange paved tiles, the player passes other pedestrians including a person in a yellow jacket while futuristic vehicles continue to pass on the street to the left. A distant smokestack is visible against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: pharmacy storefront with outdoor seating plaza

events.description: approaching Ripley's Pharmacy with green neon signage and outdoor seating area
passing outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking past the pharmacy entrance through a pedestrian plaza area

white patio umbrellas over outdoor cafe tables
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk near the seating area

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches Ripley's Pharmacy with its distinctive green neon signage. The player walks past an outdoor seating plaza with white umbrellas and palm trees, moving through a moderate crowd of pedestrians. The tall cylindrical tower from earlier is now visible in the distance to the left as the player continues along the commercial street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district at dusk. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, moving past graffiti-covered walls and an illuminated RCF sign beside heavy concrete pillars. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens into a wide intersection where the orange and purple sky is dominated by towering holographic billboards for NCOLA and Real Water. The scene then shifts onto a covered commercial sidewalk with orange paved tiles and bright advertising panels, passing pedestrians and a distant smokestack before turning toward a bustling plaza. Finally, the movement leads past white umbrellas and palm trees toward the distinctive green neon signage of Ripley's Pharmacy, with a tall cylindrical tower visible in the distance.
